top_patterns: News hooks dominate the top 3 (Ranks 1, 6) — timely, platform-relevant claims get the highest engagement
Personal stories paired with measurable, concrete experiences perform strongly (Ranks 2-3: Salesforce rollout, 8-country PMO)
TAM (Total Addressable Market) topic appears in all top 3 posts — industry-scale insights outperform generic advice
actionable_rules: Lead with a news hook or contrarian claim — 'LinkedIn just became...' or 'Most [common practice] fail...' types generate 3-5x more engagement than pure insights
Pair every insight with a personal story or specific metric — 'I built a PMO across 8 countries' outperforms abstract observations
Anchor posts in a named topic (TAM, Growth, etc.) — topical posts average 4-5x more engagement than topic-free posts
Keep titles under 15 words: one idea, one hook, no preamble. 'There's a platform tracking the entire planet' (13 eng) vs 'Intel taught me precision' (0 eng) proves brevity wins
End with a question or invite — posts with explicit CTAs for comments (hiring posts have 0 comments) need 'What do you think?' framing

top_patterns: News hooks dominate top 3 - breaking industry news and trend revelations (TAM, AI, LLM) generate 69 and 12 engagement
Personal story hooks drive highest volume in top 10 (3 of top 10) - specific, credible experiences with named companies (Salesforce) outperform generic claims
Strong topic alignment: TAM and Growth topics appear in 9 of top 13 performers - healthcare/digital transformation resonates with executive audience
actionable_rules: Lead with news/breaking insights as hook - 'Just became #1', 'platform tracking the planet' type openers generate 13-69 engagement vs 0-5 for passive insights
Anchor personal stories with a named company or specific outcome - 'Salesforce rollout' (57) and 'PMO across 8 countries' (17) outperform vague '20 years taught me' openings (3-5)
Own your TAM/Growth expertise ruthlessly - every top-13 post connects to tech AI, digital transformation, or operational scaling; this is Ahmed's differentiated positioning
Repurpose bold claims across variations but stop when engagement decays below 6 - the 'digital transformations fail' claim hit 12→8→6→4 and should have been retired earlier
Never post without a clear topic tag - every zero-engagement post has no topic; empty topics signal unfocused content to the algorithm and reader
